nasb.text: To deliver you from the strange woman, From the adulteress who flatters with her words;

esv.text: So you will be delivered from the forbidden woman, from the adulteress with her smooth words,

cnv.text: 智慧要救你脫離淫婦， 脫離說諂媚話的妓女。

ccb.text: 智慧要救你脱离淫妇， 脱离花言巧语的妓女。

csbs.text: 这也是要解救你远离淫妇， 远离说谄媚话的淫荡女子——
